note: Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Irreducible/Defs.lean:44 structure Irreducible (p : M) — general monoid notion (non-unit, only factors into units); 'irreducible polynomial' is this predicate instantiated at p : Polynomial R (used throughout e.g. FieldTheory/Perfect.lean, FieldTheory/IsAlgClosed/Basic.lean), no polynomial-specific def exists.

Mathlib/NumberTheory/Transcendental/Liouville/LiouvilleWith.lean:51 def LiouvilleWith (p x : ℝ) — file tags list 'irrationality exponent'; formalizes the approximation predicate the irrationality measure is defined from (as sup of valid p), but the measure itself as a function ℝ→ℝ≥0∞ is not defined.

Mathlib/RingTheory/AlgebraicIndependent/Defs.lean:54 def AlgebraicIndependent R x : Prop — 'states the family of elements x is algebraically independent over R, meaning the canonical map out of the multivariable polynomial ring is injective'; directly the concept.

Mathlib/Analysis/Real/Hyperreal.lean:39 def Hyperreal := Germ (hyperfilter ℕ) ℝ — ultraproduct construction of the hyperreal number system, the standard model classically used for nonstandard analysis; file's own TODO notes the transfer principle (the core NSA machinery) is not yet formalized, so this is the carrier object, not the theory.
Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph/Acyclic.lean:55-56 def IsAcyclic : Prop — docstring verbatim: 'A graph is acyclic (or a forest) if it has no cycles.'
